action: Analyze job wait timeout and provide recovery steps

error.message: job wait exceeded default timeout without reaching terminal state
error.raw: Job j-xyz-789 did not complete within the default wait period

commands: uv run certmanctl --endpoint http://127.0.0.1:8000 job get --job-id j-xyz-789
uv run certmanctl --endpoint http://127.0.0.1:8000 job wait --job-id j-xyz-789 --max-wait 600
next_steps: 用 job get 查询当前状态确认是否仍在 running
若仍运行中，使用 --max-wait 600 重试等待
若 job 已失败，查看错误并决定重新触发
